description_long: This is a spacious single-story bungalow set within a fenced property, surrounded by trees and greenery. The main building features a light-colored exterior with a prominent gable roof and several windows distributed across its facades. A large covered porch extends from the front, providing a sheltered entryway and outdoor seating area. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage or barn-like structure, as well as a water tank and fenced paddock area, suggesting a semi-rural or suburban setting. The landscaping is well-maintained, with clusters of trees and open grassy areas, and the fencing delineates different zones within the property. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear access paths and a harmonious blend of built and natural elements.
description: A large, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, detached garage, and fenced, tree-lined property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and most of the trees and fencing.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the detached garage, water tank, and the back of the bungalow with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, dense tree line, and the water tank adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway, garage, and the arrangement of trees and fencing along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
